title: Croatian-Style Grilled Skewers with Citrusy Vinaigrette
description: A flavorful and refreshing summer dish featuring marinated skewers of meat and vegetables, served with a tangy citrus vinaigrette.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced onions and zucchini to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread the sausage, bell peppers, and onions onto skewers.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the sausage is cooked through.
Brush the skewers with the citrus vinaigrette during the last minute of grilling.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
